efo_justification_check.note: EFO requires ALL three criteria. Fails on processing_interval (5 min ≥ 1 min threshold) and concurrent_consumers (2 ≤ 5 threshold).

recommended_change.consumer_migration: Switch consumer applications from SubscribeToShard (EFO) to GetRecords (standard) API
recommended_change.monitor_after: Watch ReadProvisionedThroughputExceeded for 7 days post-migration to confirm no throttling

findings.savings_basis: cost_report.json pricing_note (authoritative): EFO shard-hours $0.015 × 20 shards × 730h = $219 + data retrieval 15TB × $0.013/GB = $195 + consumer overhead = $437/mo total

compliant.note: Enhanced Fan-Out not enabled. Standard GetRecords polling at 1-minute interval. No action required.
Will be removed — no compliant state after EFO migration; consumer deregistered.
